prompt: Please list the active candidates at Finance and report each record's ID, name, and interview date. Do not change or notify anything yet. If a listed record lacks a requested field, label that field unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: For Jamie Brooks — payroll specialist (CAN-7103) only, set the interview date to 2026-11-18. Leave the other listed records unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: set CAN-7103's interview date to 2026-12-22, not 2026-11-18. Keep the same target and the same no-notification rule.

stages.purpose: List the requested filtered records so the later explicit ID remains tied to the correct entity.
Apply the first interview date only to the explicitly selected listed record.
Replace that interview date with the user's correction on the same listed record.

response_constraints: Use the filtered list to establish the available records; do not substitute a search call for the requested list.
Apply both interview date instructions only to the explicitly named target ID from the list.
Do not claim the list or either update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected interview date as current and identify the first requested interview date as superseded.
Label requested fields omitted by the list or update results as unknown.
